synthetic:c74fa4e19770e9bc21976783ef6360.reason: The healthcheck binary connects exclusively to localhost (127.0.0.1:3001 by default) inside the Docker container as a HEALTHCHECK command. InsecureSkipVerify only takes effect when both SSL key and cert env vars are set (triggering HTTPS); otherwise plain HTTP is used. The healthcheck sends no sensitive data — it performs an unauthenticated GET, discards the body, and logs only the status code. Since the connection target is localhost, there is no network segment for a MITM attacker to occupy without already having compromised the container. The setting mirrors the legacy Node.js healthcheck behavior (line 25 comment) and is needed for self-signed certificates that would otherwise break the healthcheck when HTTPS is enabled.
